response.original_title: Night of the Living Dead - The Charter Way
response.overview: As the world around them erupts into a zombie apocalypse, three Charter High School students find themselves trapped in a terrifying reality. A sudden, inexplicable outbreak transforms their classmates and community into ravenous zombies, forcing them to confront a nightmare beyond their wildest imaginations. Amidst the chaos, the unlikely trio – the studious overachiever, the rebellious artist, and the quiet observer – must band together, utilizing their diverse skills to survive. As the undead horde closes in, they navigate the school's familiar hallways, now a battleground, searching for a safe haven. Faced with impossible odds and dwindling hope, they must decide if their fragile alliance can withstand the night, or if they'll become the next victims in this chilling, student-made retelling of a classic horror tale. Will their charter school spirit be enough to see them through the night of the living dead?
response.title: Night of the Living Dead - The Charter Way
